$comment: Workshop MCP servers. Linear, Neon and Vercel authenticate via OAuth in the browser on first use (/mcp in Claude Code). The GitHub MCP endpoint does not support dynamic client registration, so OAuth from Claude Code fails there — use the gh CLI for GitHub operations (or add a PAT-header entry in a local, untracked scope). This file holds no secrets and must stay that way; never add token-bearing entries here.
